description_long: This is a sleek, modern digital wristwatch with a segmented, glossy black band that appears to be made of a hard, polished material, likely ceramic or metal. The watch face is rectangular and seamlessly integrated into the band, displaying a digital time readout (12:38) and date (31-07-19) in white text on a black background. Below the digital display, there is a decorative section with a white background and scattered gold dots, adding a touch of visual interest. The band consists of multiple articulated links, giving it a flexible yet robust appearance. No visible buttons or crown are present, suggesting a minimalist, touch-based or gesture-controlled interface. The overall design is futuristic and stylish, suitable for urban and contemporary settings.
description: A glossy black digital wristwatch with a segmented band and a rectangular display showing time and date, featuring a decorative gold-dotted section below the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display with time and date, and a decorative gold-dotted section below the screen.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the segmented, glossy black band and a partial glimpse of the digital display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the smooth, glossy black band with no visible display or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the segmented band and the absence of any visible display or features.
attribute_dial_design: Minimalist digital dial with a rectangular display, white digital numerals for time and date, and a decorative section with gold dots below the display. No indices, numerals, or subdials present.
attribute_strap_type: Segmented link bracelet, likely ceramic or metal, with a glossy black finish and articulated construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with white numerals for time and date, no analog hands, and a decorative lower section. No additional complications or luminous elements visible.
